intent: No-motion pendant caller that applies actual data-register comments for the generated A_ workflow scratch registers.

safety.notes: Calls A_REGCMT only. A_REGCMT uses SET_REG_CMT for R[80] and R[90]-R[94] comments only; it does not write register values, IO, motion, task control, or program selection.

verification.notes: Upload is staging only. Operator runs once from the pendant to apply actual register comments, then verifies DATA > Registers comments for R[80] and R[90]-R[94].
